evals.prompt: /wechat 帮我找张三昨天发的消息
evals.expected_output: Skill checks key status first. If no key, guides through extraction. If key exists, translates to: wxtools query --json --contact "张三" --since <yesterday> --limit 100. Presents results in Chinese with sender name and timestamp on each message.

evals.prompt: /wechat 搜索"开会"相关的消息，最近一周的
evals.expected_output: Translates to: wxtools query --json "开会" --since <7 days ago>. Presents matching messages with context. If many results, shows count and first 10 with offer to paginate.

evals.prompt: /wechat 导出工作群最近一个月的聊天记录
evals.expected_output: Translates to: wxtools export --json --format json --conversation "工作群" --since <1 month ago> --output ./export/. If large, informs user of estimated count and asks for confirmation before adding --yes.
